indications.text:
ZYTIGA is indicated in combination with prednisone for the treatment of patients with
• Metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC)
• Metastatic high-risk castration-sensitive prostate cancer (CSPC)

ZYTIGA in combination with prednisone is indicated for the treatment of patients with
metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC) who have received prior
chemotherapy containing docetaxel.

ZYTIGA is a CYP17 inhibitor indicated in combination with prednisone for the treatment of
patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer.
